value.stringValue: New Letter of Intent Request for {!$Record.SourceOpportunity.Name}

Hi,

A Letter of Intent request has been created for the following Opportunity: {!$Record.SourceOpportunity.Name}.

The following Contract has been created: {!$Record.ContractNumber}.

Thank you,
{!$Record.SourceOpportunity.Owner.FirstName}

actionCalls.name: Trigger_Practice_Operation_Change_Queueable_Action_1
actionCalls.label: Trigger Practice Operation Change Queueable Action 1

value.stringValue: Attach Locum Assignment Letter to HPF
Populate the Shift Map & Rates template

assignments.label: Assign Default Task Values Leased Provider

value.stringValue: Review the related clinician contract to determine if a Leased Provider Acknowledgment is required.

decisions.label: Start/End Date changed all for applicable RT ?

rules.name: Yes1
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 ) OR ( 3 AND 4 ) AND ( 5 OR 6 OR 7 )
rules.label: Yes

Flow.description: PR1050558-4548 - When the Contract’s start or end date changes (and is not blank), update the PNC record dates to match it for Client, Clinical, and PO contract types. PR1050558-5225 - Leased Provider Contract PR1050558-6295 - Add user Fed Id check
Flow.label: Contract After Save
